1.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue

1.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix

1.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

1.gl: vigor, literally (force, in a good or a bad sense) or figuratively (capacity, means, produce); also (from its hardiness) a large lizard
1.kj: ability, able, chameleon, force, fruits, might, power(-ful), strength, substance, wealth.
1.dv: or (Daniel 11:6) כּוֹחַ; from an unused root meaning to be firm;

1.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
1.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

2.gl: to tread; by implication, to walk; also to string abow (by treading on it in bending)
2.kj: archer, bend, come, draw, go (over), guide, lead (forth), thresh, tread (down), walk.

2.gl: a covering, i.e. clothing; also treachery or pillage
2.kj: apparel, cloth(-es, ing), garment, lap, rag, raiment, robe, [idiom] very (treacherously), vesture, wardrobe.

2.gl: a garment (literally or figuratively); by implication (euphemistically) a wife
2.kj: apparel, clothed with, clothing, garment, raiment, vestment, vesture.

2.dv: or מַדֻּעַ; from H4100 (מָה) and the passive participle of H3045 (יָדַע);

2.gl: a wine-press (or vat for holding the grapes in pressing them)
2.dv: probably from H5059 (נָגַן) (in the sense of treading out grapes);

3.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)

3.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

3.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

16.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

17.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again

17.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything

17.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
17.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
17.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

17.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
17.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

17.gl: properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion
17.kj: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare H5158 (נַחַל).

17.gl: to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both
17.kj: (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way.

18.gl: to occupy (by driving out previous tenants, and possessing in their place); by implication, to seize, to rob, to inherit; also to expel, to impoverish, to ruin
18.kj: cast out, consume, destroy, disinherit, dispossess, drive(-ing) out, enjoy, expel, [idiom] without fail, (give to, leave for) inherit(-ance, -or) [phrase] magistrate, be (make) poo

18.gl: narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)
18.kj: adversary, afflicted(-tion), anguish, close, distress, enemy, flint, foe, narrow, small, sorrow, strait, tribulation, trouble.
18.dv: or צָר; from H6887 (צָרַר); compare as in H6864 (צֹר)

18.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
18.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

18.gl: a consecrated thing or place, especially, a palace, sanctuary (whether of Jehovah or of idols) or asylum
18.kj: chapel, hallowed part, holy place, sanctuary.

18.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

19.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
19.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
19.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

19.kj: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, re
19.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

19.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
19.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));
